relocation.package_summary: Ema offers standard startup relocation support including lump-sum payments or managed moves; typical for Bay Area hires from Seattle covers movers, temp housing, flights, and possible sign-on relo bonus. No public detailed policy found.
relocation.policy_notes: No public info on cooldown, tax gross-up, or vesting for relo bonus. Sources indicate general startup practices but nothing Ema-specific.
